calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY R. CLUETT OF THE LAW OFFICES OF ANN RANKIN, TEL. NO. (510) 653-8886 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER 1325 INDIANA STREET OWNER'S ASSOCIATION's Hearing On Petition to Approve the First Amended and restated Declaration of Covenants, conditions and Restrictions pursuant to CA Civil Code Section 4275 is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 =(302/JKS)
